## Pack Information

**Pack ID**: (e.g., `warfare-modern`)

**Pack Version**: (if known)

**Pack Type**:
- [ ] content
- [ ] balance
- [ ] ruleset
- [ ] total_conversion
- [ ] utility

## Issue Type

- [ ] Bug (pack doesn't work as expected)
- [ ] Balance (units/buildings are overpowered or underpowered)
- [ ] Content Quality (missing assets, poor descriptions, etc.)
- [ ] Compatibility (conflicts with other packs)
- [ ] Feature Request (missing content or functionality)

## Description

Describe the issue clearly and concisely.

## Steps to Reproduce (for bugs)

How can we reproduce this issue?

1. Load pack with `...`
2. Perform action `...`
3. See result `...`

## Expected vs Actual

**Expected**: What should happen?

**Actual**: What actually happens?

## Game Details

- DINOForge Version
- DINO Game Version
- Other mods loaded (if applicable)

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help?

## Checklist

- [ ] I've tested this issue myself
- [ ] I'm using the latest version of the pack
- [ ] This isn't a duplicate of an existing issue
- [ ] I've searched for similar issues first
